description_long: This is a sleek, modern sports car with a bold, metallic red exterior and a muscular, aerodynamic body. The front features a wide, aggressive grille with dual round headlights and a prominent hood scoop, giving it a powerful presence. The side profile reveals a two-door coupe design with tinted windows, blacked-out wheels, and subtle sculpted lines that enhance its sporty character. At the rear, the car has a black spoiler, wide taillights, and a robust bumper, emphasizing its performance-oriented design. The wheels are large, black, and multi-spoked, complementing the car's dynamic stance. The overall appearance suggests a high-performance vehicle built for speed and style, likely with a comfortable yet focused interior.
description: A bold, metallic red two-door sports car with blacked-out wheels, aggressive front grille, and a rear spoiler, exuding speed and style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, dual round headlights, hood scoop, and muscular front fenders.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the coupe profile, two doors, black wheels, and sculpted body lines.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the black spoiler, wide taillights, and robust rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coupe shape, black wheels, and aerodynamic lines.
